subjects.name: English
topics: Trace the letters following the dotted line and color the letters
Draw lines from the letter to the picture starting from the dot
Draw lines to match the same letter
Draw lines to match the letter with the correct picture
Vocabulary: A-Ant, B-Bee, C-Cat, D-Dog, E-Egg, F-Fan, H-Hen, I-Ice Cream, O-Ox, T-Tea
subjects.description: Focus on basic letter recognition, tracing, and vocabulary A through T

subjects.name: Mathematics
topics: Write numbers 1-6 following the lines and write freehand in the box
Draw the correct amount of circles in the box next to the numbers
Trace number 6 following the dotted line and color
Write numbers 1-7 following the lines and write freehand in the box
Draw the correct amount of circles in the box next to the number
Color the correct amount of pictures, cut and paste in boxes
Vocabulary: One through ten
subjects.description: Early numeracy: counting 1-7, number formation, quantity matching

subjects.name: I.Q
topics: Object and Animal - Circle the animals
Direction (Above) - Cross objects that are above
Objects in same group - Draw lines to match
Near and Far - Mark X on objects that are further
Size objects - Draw lines to match suitable size
Direction: Front and back - Circle pictures facing front, cross facing back
Animal (Wings) - Circle animals with wings
Incomplete - Mark incomplete objects with X

Vocabulary: Car, giraffe, girl, cat, telephone, alarm clock, vase/flower, toothbrush/toothpaste, pot/stove, bird, duck, hen, owl, lion, turtle, dog, book, boat, small girl, small dress, big girl, big dress, pencil, van, frog, rice cooker, swing, briefcase
subjects.description: Visual-spatial reasoning, categorization, directionality, size comparison

subjects.name: Phonics
topics: Letter R
Letter S
Rev Q/R/S
Letter T
Letter U
Vocabulary: Ricky rabbit, read, Susie seal, sun, quiet, on, tiger, uncle, Teddy tiger, teeth, Uncle utter, under
subjects.description: Phonics review Q through U with vocabulary reinforcement

subjects.name: Science
topics: Mixing colours - primary and secondary by mixing coloured water
Bottle diver experiment - buoyancy and density with bottle diver
Air Pressure - candle and bottle experiment
Air rocket - air pressure moving objects with rocket toy
Vocabulary: Water, colour, mix, bowl, bottle, paper, paper-clip, food colouring, candle, air, sound, table, pencil, air rocket, stepping hard, press/push, fly up
subjects.description: Hands-on science: color mixing, buoyancy, air pressure experiments

subjects.name: Conversation 1
topics: Colours Question - What colour is the banana/tree? Answer: The ... is yellow/green
Family Members Question - Who do you love? Answer: I love my father and mother
Abilities Question - What can you do? Answer: I can sing/dance
Playground Equipment Question - Where do you like playing? Answer: I like playing on the seesaw/slide
Vocabulary: Green, yellow, red, blue, mother, father, sing, dance, seesaw, slide
subjects.description: Basic conversation: colors, family, abilities, playground

subjects.name: Conversation 3
topics: Food: Actions - What are you doing? I am walking
Weather - How's the weather? It's sunny
Vocabulary: walking, running, jumping, sitting, sunny, rainy, cloudy

subjects.name: Arts
topics: Butterfly squish painting
Sponge painting tree design
New year card making
Origami - house
Vocabulary: fold, paper, squish, paint, butterfly, flower, sponge, stem, new year, January, card, house, window, roof
subjects.description: Creative arts: painting techniques, card making, origami

subjects.name: Physical Education
topics: Hopscotch
Picking Up
Matching & Dropping Ball Race Jumping
Dart Ball Game
Cart Racing
Vocabulary: Hop, number, match, ball, chair, colour, dart board, throw, cart, push, race
subjects.description: Gross motor skills: hopping, ball handling, racing games

subjects.name: Puppet Show
topics: The Ants and the Grasshopper
Lion and the Mouse
Vocabulary: ant, grasshopper, hungry, winter, food, lion, mouse, forest, net
subjects.description: Storytelling through puppetry: fables with morals
